headline: 20,290 Earthquake Events Across 389 Regions (2000–2025)
summary: This dataset documents 20,290 earthquake events from 2000-01-19 to 2025-06-30 across 389 distinct regions. 41 critical (red) and 193 elevated (orange) alerts were recorded. Top affected regions: Indonesia, Japan, United States.
keyInsights: Indonesia leads with 2,391 events (11.8% of total), followed by Japan (1,409) and United States (1,136).
41 critical-level events identified, the most severe being Red M 8.8 Earthquake in Chile at: 27 Feb 2010 06:34:14..
193 elevated (orange) alert events requiring close monitoring across multiple regions.
98.8% of events are advisory (green) level, but the 234 elevated-or-higher events represent significant cumulative risk.
